tasks.name: User Authentication Flow
tasks.description:
Implement login/logout with JWT tokens.

## Problem
No authentication system exists.

## Files to modify
- src/routes/auth.ts — login/logout endpoints
- src/middleware/auth.ts — JWT verification

## Implementation order
1. Create login endpoint with JWT generation
2. Create auth middleware
3. Add logout endpoint
4. Compile and verify

tasks.name: Full-Text Search API
tasks.description:
Add GET /api/search with keyword matching, filtering, and pagination.

## Files to modify
- src/services/SearchService.ts — query builder
- src/routes/search.ts — endpoint handler

## Implementation order
1. SearchService with DB full-text query
2. Route handler with pagination
3. Compile and verify
